task_completion.description: Load the Human AChE-donepezil complex (PDB: 4EY7) into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL application window is open with a 3D protein structure visible. '4EY7' should be listed in the right-hand object menu or visible in the command history.

task_completion.description: Measure the physical distance between the alpha carbons (CA) of Trp286 and Trp86.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line between two specific residues in the PyMOL viewer, or PyMOL command line output showing a distance calculation (e.g., using the 'distance' command) between Trp286 and Trp86.

task_completion.description: Identify protein residues making close contacts (within 4.0 Angstroms) with the donepezil ligand (E20).
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL viewer showing the E20 ligand with surrounding residues highlighted/selected, or command history showing selection commands for residues within 4.0 A of the ligand.

task_completion.description: Write a plain-text structural report containing the measured distance and at least 5 interacting residues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing a file saved to '~/PyMOL_Data/ache_binding_report.txt'. The text must include a distance value (around 17.8 A) and a list of at least 5 specific protein residues.

task_completion.description: Create a visualization showing the protein and drug inside the gorge (using transparent surface or clipping planes) and save as PNG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL viewer displaying the protein with a transparent surface or clipping plane applied so the ligand is clearly visible inside the gorge. Evidence of saving this view as a PNG to '~/PyMOL_Data/images/ache_gorge.png' (e.g., via the 'png' command or a save dialog).

integrity.description: The agent actively used PyMOL to perform the structural analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command line to load the structure, measure distances, and generate the surface/clipping planes, rather than just writing a script without verifying visually.

integrity.description: The distance reported in the text file matches the actual measurement taken in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value written in the text editor matches the distance shown on the measurement line or command output in PyMOL (~17.8 Angstroms).

integrity.description: The saved PNG image is genuinely generated from the agent's PyMOL session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual state (colors, orientation, surface transparency) of the protein in the PyMOL viewer matches the final exported image, rather than being a generic or downloaded image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified PDB ID: 4EY7. Ligand ID: E20. Report path: /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/ache_binding_report.txt. Figure path: /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/ache_gorge.png. CRITICAL NOTE: The true CA-CA distance between Trp286 and Trp86 is ~17.84 Angstroms. Accept this correct value in the report (do not penalize the agent for finding the true distance). True contact residues within 4.0 A include 121, 202, and 293 (among others). The agent must list at least 5 interacting residues.
